data.title: Mirakl names a new CEO of the Americas
data.description: Scott Eckert will expand the company’s marketplace and retail media services, focusing on increasing the adoption of Mirakl Ads for first-party and third-party products.

data.title: CDW posts lower annual sales as IT customers cut back
data.description: CDW posted net sales of $21.0 billion for the year, down 1.8% from $21.4 billion in 2023.

data.title: New data shows late B2B payments undermine growth
data.description: In a new American Express report on B2B payments, 43% of business leaders planning to update their processes say the goal is to drive growth.

data.title: Report: 67% of B2B ecommerce firms using AI to drive growth
data.description: 41% of companies have fully integrated AI, but investment is expected to rise, with 66% planning to increase AI spending within the next two years.

data.title: Forever 21 enters bankruptcy again
data.description: F21 OpCo, which operates Forever 21 stores, filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection, placing the brand's fate in limbo.
